title: Installing the app for hackathon
excerpt: We are pretty much finished the app now and just wondering if there is a checklist/guide to installing our app so that we can get an install link for submitting to the hackathon? Just want to check we have do everything …

posts.author: Shinny (Sinead)
posts.cookedHtml: We are pretty much finished the app now and just wondering if there is a checklist/guide to installing our app so that we can get an install link for submitting to the hackathon? Just want to check we have do everything correctly there on time for tomorrow. Thanks for any help or tips and… best of luck to everyone entering!

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Shinny,

We have a ‘final checklist’ for submitting the application to the competition, I’ll just go ahead and paste it directly on here for reference:

Final checklist:
Before the deadline passes, make sure you run through this list:

  • Are you submitting a functioning monday app?
  • Did you provide an installation link for testing?
  • Have you submitted a 2-minute video of your entry? Did you include a short explanation about what the app does and which category it was built for (Business, marketplace, or NGO)?

The app would need to be ‘running’ when submitted which will give you an installation link for testing. This can be found within your account under the ‘Developer’ section, under the ‘Publish’ section for your application:

image1182×1053 74.7 KB

Let me know if we can help with anything else.

-Daniel
